column2: Event timestamp from the embedded device date field or syslog prefix.
Firewall device name or host that emitted the event.
Firewall management module such as policy zone blacklist webui cli or flow control.
Canonical firewall event category such as policy_rule zone_config blacklist admin_session or flow_control.
Normalized action requested by the administrator such as add set del login logout show or clear.
Administrator or operator account referenced by the event.
Management client IP address from the from field.
Normalized result such as success failure or unknown.
Policy source address object or literal address from sa.
Policy destination address object or literal address from da.
Inbound interface referenced by a firewall rule.
Outbound interface referenced by a firewall rule.
Inbound security zone referenced by a firewall rule.
Outbound security zone referenced by a firewall rule.
Firewall service or protocol object referenced by a rule.
Firewall policy identifier from policy.
Firewall rule identifier from id.
Stable composed identifier for a firewall rule.
Normalized policy type such as permit deny nat proxy port_map ip_map or antiddos.
Rule enabled state such as enabled disabled on or off.
Whether logging is enabled for the rule.
Translated source address for NAT policies.
Public mapped address for IP or port mapping policies.
Internal address or object used by mapping policies.
Public mapped service or port.
Internal mapped service or port.
Security zone name extracted from zone configuration events.
IP address added removed shown or cleared by blacklist events.
